message:
style(interactive): rustfmt formatting cleanup in conversation + share tests

- conversation.rs: fix indentation of UserMessage struct literal and
  TextContent::new() call to match rustfmt canonical style
- share.rs: collapse multi-line function calls that fit on one line
  (parse_gist_url_and_id), reformat let binding for trailing punctuation
  test — all whitespace-only changes from concurrent rustfmt pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
